name: ResponseScribe
description:
ResponseScribe helps you deliver personalized on-brand reviews to your customers within hours. 
‍

Source: Website

Features:

➡️Helps quickly connect to review sites and personalize replies easily

➡️Provides text and email alerts 

➡️Review insights 

➡️AI-powered responses

➡️White-labelling 

Pros:

✅Supports 75+ review sites 

✅Custom, on-brand responses 

✅Can edit review responses 

✅AI-powered responses 

Cons:

❌Does not have any social listening tools that can be an add-on

Priced at 19$ Per Month

*Review sourced and cited through Google Reviews*
